from fastapi.responses import StreamingResponse
import json

def get_large_report():
    # Correct: yield rows incrementally via a generator for constant memory usage
    def generate_json():
        yield "["
        for i, row in enumerate(db.stream_millions_of_rows()):
            if i > 0: yield ","
            yield json.dumps(row)
        yield "]"
    return StreamingResponse(generate_json(), media_type="application/json")
